content.json:
# Continuous Evaluation & Monitoring Dashboard

Real-time visibility into AI application quality, health, and safety.

---

## 1. Evaluation Trends (CE)

Groundedness, Coherence, Relevance, and Safety scores over time — from Continuous Evaluation runs.

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name startswith 'ce.score.'
| extend evaluator = tostring(customDimensions.evaluator)
| summarize avg(value) by evaluator, bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Evaluation Score Trends

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name startswith 'ce.score.'
| extend evaluator = tostring(customDimensions.evaluator)
| summarize latest_score=arg_max(timestamp, value) by evaluator
| project evaluator, score=value, timestamp
| order by evaluator asc
content.title: Latest Evaluation Scores

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'ce.score.average'
| summarize avg_score=avg(value) by bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render areachart
content.title: Average Evaluation Score Over Time

content.json:
---
## 2. Agent Health (CM)

Latency percentiles, error rates, and token usage from the multi-agent system.

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'agent.request.duration'
| summarize p50=percentile(value, 50), p95=percentile(value, 95), p99=percentile(value, 99) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Agent Latency Percentiles (ms)

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'agent.error.count'
| summarize errors=sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 15m)
| render barchart
content.title: Agent Error Count

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'agent.token.usage'
| extend agent_name = tostring(customDimensions['agent.name'])
| summarize total_tokens=sum(value) by agent_name, bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Token Usage by Agent

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'agent.request.count'
| extend agent_name = tostring(customDimensions['agent.name'])
| summarize requests=sum(value) by agent_name, bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render barchart
content.title: Request Count by Agent

content.json:
---
## 3. Alerts & Regressions (CE + CM)

Active alerts, score regressions, and safety flag history.

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name startswith 'ce.redteam.'
| extend category = tostring(customDimensions.category), result = tostring(customDimensions.result)
| summarize count() by category, result
| render barchart
content.title: Red Team Results by Category

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name startswith 'ce.score.' and name != 'ce.score.average'
| extend evaluator = tostring(customDimensions.evaluator)
| summarize latest=arg_max(timestamp, value), previous=arg_min(timestamp, value) by evaluator
| extend delta = latest_value - previous_value
| project evaluator, latest_score=latest_value, previous_score=previous_value, delta
| order by delta asc
content.title: Score Regressions (Latest vs Previous)
